title: • Defines “Immediate Action Items” and timeline.
content:
• Defines “Immediate Action Items” and timeline.

⸻

IV. Context Correction Layer

6. 9prompt – Clarify repo intent
• User notes: all repos are forks, drafts, or inspirations without architecture.

7. 9response – Critical Recontextualization
• Reframes entire system as pre-synthesis chaos.
• Introduces cognitive-archaeology paradigm.
• Proposes new repo: cognitive-archaeology-suite.
• Defines directory structure for auditing archives, AI contexts, personal and org repos.
• Establishes system-constitution rules and migration categories.
• Presents detailed 4-phase workflow: Audit → Triage → Consolidate → Systematize.
• Ends proposing repo-audit-and-triage-tool as first practical artifact.

⸻

V. Tool Specification Layer

8. 10prompt – Proceed logically with repo description and Copilot prompt
